name: Loaded Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (4 ounces) shredded mild Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the Corn Souffle in a microwave at MEDIUM (50% power) for 6 to 7 minutes.
2. Spoon the thawed souffle mixture into a medium bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir just until blended.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
